title: Deep Agent Subagent
description: Managed Deep Agent subagent. Must be wired into a Deep Agent node via the deepagent channel.
Cannot be invoked directly, has no questions lane.

llm.description: LLM used by this sub-agent when delegated to

tool.description: Tools available to this sub-agent (via control-plane invoke)

description.title: Description
description.description: The orchestrator reads this description to decide when to delegate to this sub-agent. Keep it specific and action-oriented, this is the only signal the orchestrator uses to pick a sub-agent.

system_prompt.title: System prompt
system_prompt.description: Instructions that define this sub-agent's role and behaviour. Leave blank to use the default.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: Additional instructions to guide this sub-agent. Each line is appended to the system prompt.

advanced_mode.title: Advanced Mode
advanced_mode.description: When enabled, replace the Instructions list with a direct System Prompt field for full control.
